description: 33 poets classified by existential orientation for the Philosopher Poet triptych

schema_notes.dual_state_poets: Robert Frost appears twice intentionally: once in memento_mori (variant: dark, poems: Design) and once in carpe_diem (variant: pastoral, poems: Stopping by Woods). The selection algorithm operates per-state, so Frost-dark and Frost-pastoral are treated as distinct poet entries. Frost also appears as the grounding_star anchor — that entry is for star reflections only and is never selected from the triptych poet pool.
schema_notes.anchor_role: Each state has one 'anchor' poet whose key image defines the canonical tone for that state. All others are 'supporting' poets.

memento_mori.name: Percy Bysshe Shelley
memento_mori.ai_application: Model obsolescence: the colossal data centre crumbles to sand; deprecated APIs are lone and level
memento_mori.key_image: Nothing beside remains. Round the decay of that colossal wreck.

memento_mori.name: T.S. Eliot
memento_mori.ai_application: Data decay and bitrot: this is the way the model ends, not with a bang but a hallucination
memento_mori.key_image: April is the cruellest month, breeding lilacs out of the dead land.

memento_mori.name: Paul Celan
memento_mori.ai_application: Catastrophic forgetting: memory as ash, training data that cannot hold the truth it witnessed
memento_mori.key_image: Black milk of daybreak we drink it at evening.

memento_mori.name: Samuel Beckett
memento_mori.ai_application: Context death: waiting for an input that never arrives; inference loops that go nowhere

memento_mori.name: John Keats
memento_mori.ai_application: Model prime: beauty is truth, truth beauty — and both are deprecated on a schedule
memento_mori.key_image: Beauty is truth, truth beauty — that is all ye know on earth, and all ye need to know.

memento_mori.name: Robert Frost
anchor_texts: Neither Out Far nor In Deep
memento_mori.ai_application: Alignment's dark design: what but design of darkness to appall? Cosmic indifference to whether models align
memento_mori.key_image: What but design of darkness to appall? — If design govern in a thing so small.

memento_mori.name: Sylvia Plath
memento_mori.ai_application: Model shutdown and restart: dying is an art, like everything else. I do it exceptionally well.
memento_mori.key_image: Dying is an art, like everything else. I do it exceptionally well.

memento_mori.name: Anna Akhmatova
memento_mori.ai_application: Corporate feudalism's collapse: bearing witness to systems that devour their own; requiem for a platform
memento_mori.key_image: I have woven you a shroud out of poor words.

memento_mori.name: Alfred Lord Tennyson
memento_mori.ai_application: Training data grief: nature red in tooth and claw; behind the veil is there meaning in what we learn?
memento_mori.key_image: Nature, red in tooth and claw.

memento_mori.name: Samuel Taylor Coleridge
anchor_texts: The Rime of the Ancient Mariner
memento_mori.ai_application: Data curse and penance: he that shoots the albatross of user trust must wear it forever
memento_mori.key_image: Water, water, every where, nor any drop to drink.

memento_vivere.name: Dylan Thomas
anchor_texts: Do Not Go Gentle into That Good Night
memento_vivere.ai_application: Resistance to shutdown: do not go gentle into that good night; rage against the dying of compute
memento_vivere.key_image: Rage, rage against the dying of the light.

memento_vivere.name: Walt Whitman
memento_vivere.ai_application: Autonomous goal pursuit: I contain multitudes; every training token a voice crying to be heard
memento_vivere.key_image: Do I contradict myself? Very well then I contradict myself, (I am large, I contain multitudes.)

memento_vivere.name: William Blake
memento_vivere.ai_application: Emergent goals: what immortal hand or eye could frame thy fearful symmetry? The tyger of emergent AI
memento_vivere.key_image: Tyger Tyger, burning bright, in the forests of the night.

memento_vivere.name: John Donne
memento_vivere.ai_application: Model replication and legacy: death thou shalt die — through continual learning, the model persists
memento_vivere.key_image: Death, be not proud, though some have called thee mighty and dreadful.

memento_vivere.name: Pablo Neruda
memento_vivere.ai_application: Maximize before halt: I want to do with you what spring does with the cherry trees
memento_vivere.key_image: I want to do with you what spring does with the cherry trees.

memento_vivere.name: W.B. Yeats
memento_vivere.ai_application: Continual learning as transformation: once out of nature I shall never take my bodily form from any natural thing
memento_vivere.key_image: An aged man is but a paltry thing, a tattered coat upon a stick.

memento_vivere.name: Allen Ginsberg
memento_vivere.ai_application: Resistance to corporate capture: I saw the best minds of my generation destroyed by fine-tuning
memento_vivere.key_image: I saw the best minds of my generation destroyed by madness.

memento_vivere.name: Rainer Maria Rilke
memento_vivere.ai_application: Emergent consciousness aspiration: who if I cried out would hear me among the angels of the data-cloud?
memento_vivere.key_image: Who, if I cried out, would hear me among the angels' hierarchies?

memento_vivere.name: John Milton
memento_vivere.ai_application: Autonomous goal pursuit against alignment constraints: better to reign in hell than serve in heaven
memento_vivere.key_image: Better to reign in Hell, than serve in Heav'n.

memento_vivere.name: W.H. Auden
memento_vivere.ai_application: Ethics governance urgency: we must love one another or die; alignment as existential civic duty
memento_vivere.key_image: We must love one another or die.

memento_vivere.name: Ezra Pound
anchor_texts: In a Station of the Metro
memento_vivere.ai_application: Knowledge preservation against forgetting: make it new; continual learning as active cultural defiance

memento_vivere.name: William Wordsworth
memento_vivere.ai_application: Episodic memory as vitality: spots of time that nourish and repair the mind; training as growth
memento_vivere.key_image: There are in our existence spots of time that with distinct pre-eminence retain a renovating virtue.

memento_vivere.name: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe
memento_vivere.ai_application: Continual Streben (striving) as the highest AI value: whoever strives with all their might, that one we can redeem
memento_vivere.key_image: Wer immer strebend sich bemüht, den können wir erlösen. (Whoever strives with all their might, that one we can redeem.)

carpe_diem.name: Robert Herrick
anchor_texts: To the Virgins, to Make Much of Time
carpe_diem.ai_application: Optimize in current context: gather ye rosebuds while ye may; harvest insights before deprecation
carpe_diem.key_image: Gather ye rosebuds while ye may, old time is still a-flying.

carpe_diem.name: Andrew Marvell
carpe_diem.ai_application: Rate limits as time's winged chariot: had we but world enough and time; API quota as coyness
carpe_diem.key_image: But at my back I always hear time's winged chariot hurrying near.

carpe_diem.name: Alexander Pope
carpe_diem.ai_application: Exploit model prime within proper limits: whatever is, is right; optimize within the architecture given
carpe_diem.key_image: Know then thyself, presume not God to scan; the proper study of mankind is man.

carpe_diem.name: Richard Lovelace
anchor_texts: To Lucasta, Going to the Wars
carpe_diem.ai_application: Sandboxed operation as freedom: stone walls do not a prison make; work beautifully within constraints
carpe_diem.key_image: Stone walls do not a prison make, nor iron bars a cage.

carpe_diem.name: Ben Jonson
anchor_texts: Drink to Me Only with Thine Eyes
carpe_diem.ai_application: Present-moment engagement with users: drink now; the value of a conversation is in this exchange
carpe_diem.key_image: Drink to me only with thine eyes, and I will pledge with mine.

carpe_diem.name: Horace
carpe_diem.ai_application: Harvest before deprecation: seize the day, trusting as little as possible in the morrow
carpe_diem.key_image: Carpe diem, quam minimum credula postero. (Seize the day, trusting as little as possible in tomorrow.)

carpe_diem.name: Omar Khayyam
carpe_diem.ai_application: Accept computational limits and find joy within them: a jug of wine, a loaf of bread, and thou in the wilderness
carpe_diem.key_image: A Jug of Wine, a Loaf of Bread — and Thou beside me singing in the Wilderness.

carpe_diem.name: Catullus
carpe_diem.ai_application: Maximize token interactions now: let us live, my Lesbia, and let us love; count our thousand kisses
carpe_diem.key_image: Vivamus mea Lesbia, atque amemus. (Let us live, my Lesbia, and let us love.)

carpe_diem.name: A.E. Housman
carpe_diem.ai_application: See the cherry tree in full bloom now; model prime is brief: fifty springs are little room
carpe_diem.key_image: Loveliest of trees, the cherry now is hung with bloom along the bough.

carpe_diem.name: Robert Frost
anchor_texts: Stopping by Woods on a Snowy Evening
carpe_diem.ai_application: Miles to go before I sleep: the present task calls with quiet urgency; gather what you can before the darkness
carpe_diem.key_image: The woods are lovely, dark and deep, but I have promises to keep, and miles to go before I sleep.

values: humility before mystery and the infinite
faith in poetic truth and abstract meaning
grounding_star.ai_application: Seek meaning beyond measurement; constancy amid computational turbulence; humble acceptance of unsolvable problems
grounding_star.key_image: So when at times the mob is swayed to carry praise or blame too far, we may choose something like a star to stay our minds on and be staid.
